creator: torstenb@vmunix.org
text:
(In reply to torstenb from comment #2)

I came across what seems to be the originating issue on psutil's GitHub repo:
https://github.com/giampaolo/psutil/issues/2113

The info in there seems to indicate it's missing COMPAT_FREEBSD7 support in the kernel. Which explains my problem with arm64 as GENERIC (no arm back then) but even -current has COMPAT_FREEBSD7 in the generic kernel. Do you use a custom kernel?
